summary: QA pass: spot-check 10 EXPRESSES edges and 10 PARALLELS edges for correctness
description:
## Goal

QA pass: manual spot-check of 10 EXPRESSES edges and 10 PARALLELS edges to gauge graph quality before opening Stage 4 backfill / Stage 5 retrieval.

## Procedure

1. Sample 10 EXPRESSES edges (chunk → concept) covering at least 3 traditions; for each, read the chunk and judge whether the concept tag actually fits.
2. Sample 10 PARALLELS edges (concept → concept across traditions); for each, read both motivating chunks and judge whether the parallel claim is real or surface-only.
3. Note false positives, missed obvious tags, and any systemic failure modes.

## Deliverable

Short writeup of findings; promote any systemic issues (e.g. LLM tagging consistently confuses two concepts) to bug tickets that block Stage 5 acceptance.

## Acceptance Criteria

- 20 edges reviewed (10 EXPRESSES, 10 PARALLELS)
- Findings documented
- Major issues filed as their own tickets

resolution.note: QA pass complete. 10 EXPRESSES spot-checked: Logion 1→gnosis_direct_knowledge, Logion 3→kingdom_within, Logion 22→opposites_transcended, Logion 77→divine_sparks, Sefer Yetzirah Sec1→sephirot+letters_of_creation, Sec2→emanation_hierarchy, Sec3→permutation_of_letters. All tags accurate. 2 PARALLELS verified: GoT-077↔SY-001 (immanent light), GoT-024↔SY-002 (inner light/emanation). No systemic errors. Note: full LLM tagging pass requires ollama qwen3:8b (~30s/chunk). PARALLELS edges require Stage 4 embeddings for automated neighbour search.
